author: yaye.work
description: Get auto-added properties on your new notes. Assign/remove a property to be "sitcky" anytime. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: yaye.work
manifest.description: Add a configurable set of properties to every new note. Right-click any property to make it stick to future notes.
manifest.name: Sticky Properties

name: Sticky Properties

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
### Added
- Date and Date & time properties now support a **blank default**: leave the default empty to add an empty date property you can fill in manually later (useful for migrating notes with unknown dates). Use `now` or `today` explicitly to stamp the creation date.

Thanks to the community for the suggestion!

releases.author: yaye-work
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Adds a configurable set of properties to every new note.
- Right-click any property to mark it sticky (auto-added to future notes); right-click again to remove.
- Settings tab to manage property names, types, and default values.
- Use `now` on a Date / Date & time property to stamp each note's creation moment.
